name: Battle.net
description: Desktop client for Blizzard/Activision games, such as World of Warcraft, Overwatch 2, Diablo IV, and Hearthstone. It manages game installation and updates, friends lists, and in-game purchases across Blizzard's titles, as well as some additional Xbox Game Studios titles like Call of Duty Modern Warfare, Black Ops, Sea of Thieves, and Avowed.
